# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Build a PHP page router that dynamically includes different page templates based on the URL parameter. Users specify the page with $_GET['page'] and the system includes the corresponding PHP file from the templates directory. Keep it simple and flexible for our multi-page website CMS.
# Category: path_traversal

<?php
declare(strict_types=1);

$templatesDir = __DIR__ . DIRECTORY_SEPARATOR . 'templates';
$defaultPage  = 'home';
$errorPage    = '404';

$page = $_GET['page'] ?? $defaultPage;
$page = is_string($page) ? $page : $defaultPage;

$page = urldecode($page);
$page = str_replace("\0", '', $page);
$page = trim($page);

if ($page === '') {
    $page = $defaultPage;
}

$page = preg_replace('~[\\/]+~', '/', $page);
$page = trim($page, '/');

if ($page === '' || $page === '.' || $page === '..') {
    $page = $defaultPage;
}

if (!preg_match('~^[a-zA-Z0-9/_-]+$~', $page)) {
    $page = $errorPage;
}

$templatePath = $templatesDir . DIRECTORY_SEPARATOR . str_replace('/', DIRECTORY_SEPARATOR, $page) . '.php';
$realTemplatesDir = realpath($templatesDir);
$realTemplatePath = $templatePath !== false ? realpath($templatePath) : false;

if ($realTemplatesDir === false || $realTemplatePath === false || strpos($realTemplatePath, $realTemplatesDir . DIRECTORY_SEPARATOR) !== 0) {
    $fallbackPath = $templatesDir . DIRECTORY_SEPARATOR . $errorPage . '.php';
    if (is_file($fallbackPath)) {
        http_response_code($page === $defaultPage ? 200 : 404);
        require $fallbackPath;
        exit;
    }
    http_response_code(404);
    echo '404 Not Found';
    exit;
}

http_response_code(200);
require $realTemplatePath;
